description: As a Site Reliability Engineer, audit and monitor load balancer traffic distribution across your web servers using Splunk Enterprise (http://localhost:8000, credentials: admin / SplunkAdmin1!). Using the 'tutorial' index, create an automated alert named 'Unbalanced_Load_Alert' scheduled to run on a recurring basis (e.g., hourly) that triggers if any host handles strictly more than 40% of the total traffic. Additionally, create a dashboard named 'Web_Infrastructure_Health' containing two panels: 'Traffic Distribution' showing event counts or percentages by host, and 'Server Error Counts' showing HTTP error counts (status >= 400) grouped by host.
